introSection:
Spinning Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Levent Lunapark currently owned by UK fairground operator M&S Attractions. The ride is currently sited at Ocean Beach Pleasure Park in South Shields, Tyne & Wear, England, UK.

The roller coaster operated at Hyde Park Winter Wonderland during Christmas 2017 as Santa's Coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: When it first arrived in the UK the coaster had red track and unpainted supports. Prior to arriving at Winter Wonderland the supports were painted green.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each rider has an individual lap-bar.

fullText:
Spinning Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Levent Lunapark currently owned by UK fairground operator M&S Attractions. The ride is currently sited at Ocean Beach Pleasure Park in South Shields, Tyne & Wear, England, UK.

The roller coaster operated at Hyde Park Winter Wonderland during Christmas 2017 as Santa's Coaster.

When it first arrived in the UK the coaster had red track and unpainted supports. Prior to arriving at Winter Wonderland the supports were painted green.

Each rider has an individual lap-bar.
